text.title: Agent Replay Harness Cookbook Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the failure already captured in a trace with prompts, tool calls, clock, and seed?

branch.when: trace_complete == true AND coverage_ratio >= 0.9 AND replay_reproduces == true

conclusion.verdict: Adopt the cookbook. Emit manifest, commit replay tests.

branch.when: trace_complete == true AND coverage_ratio >= 0.9 AND replay_reproduces == false

conclusion.verdict: Loop back to step 2 — there is a hidden nondeterministic source not yet captured.
Split — first instrument the missing dependency class, then re-enter at step 1.
Capture first. Don't attempt to stub something you haven't recorded; you'll fabricate values and waste a day.
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.
